draft_listing.working_title: Agent Skill Starter Kit: Templates For Safer Reusable AI-Agent Workflows
draft_listing.short_description: A compact Markdown kit for turning repeatable AI-agent workflows into reusable skills with stop gates, artifact contracts, service-request checklists, examples, and acceptance reviews.
draft_listing.buyer_problem: Builders can write one-off prompts, but repeatable agent workflows need clear triggers, allowed actions, forbidden actions, examples, artifact contracts, and review checks.
target_buyer: Small teams writing internal agent workflows
Builders who want local-first task packets with explicit stop gates
not_included: Payment, tax, KYC, or payout setup
Guaranteed sales, revenue, compliance, or platform approval

local_price_hypothesis_usd.basis: local planning range only; not a public price, sale, or revenue forecast

questions: What file formats and file-size limits apply?
What refund, dispute, and support obligations apply?
What fees, payout thresholds, country restrictions, and tax collection rules apply?
Are AI-agent, prompt, or workflow-template claims restricted?
Which seller identity should be used, if any?
What tax/KYC/payment setup would be required?
What refund/license wording should be approved?
Are there local jurisdiction restrictions or reporting obligations?
Is all text original to the bundle?
Are any platform names used only descriptively?
Does the buyer license avoid overpromising compliance or results?
Are screenshots free of private, signed-in, or third-party marketplace content?
Which exact platform route is approved?
What exact title, description, price, refund wording, and screenshots are approved?
Who performs the upload and seller-account action?
What post-listing support boundary is approved?

local_acceptance.next_safe_local_action: Create a local packaging checklist and optional zip-manifest for internal review only; do not create seller accounts, verify live terms, upload files, or publish listings.
